channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Madison Square Garden Bans Lawyer Representing New York Cop Injured at a Boxing Match
item.description: Attorney John Scola is representing a police officer who is suing over injuries allegedly sustained while working security at an MSG property in 2025.

item.title: Réduction des heures creuses la nuit : la mauvaise nouvelle qui guette (entre autres) les propriétaires de voitures électriques
item.description: La fin de l'Eldorado de la recharge nocturne a sonné. Abonnements complexes sur bornes rapides, heures creuses déplacées en plein après-midi, hausse contrainte de la puissance du compteur… Les propriétaires de voitures électriques vont devoir s'adapter rapidement pour ne pas être trop impactés par ces nouvelles tarifications. On fait le point.

item.title: Firefox's free VPN now lets you pick your favorite server location
item.description: Mozilla has added location selection to Firefox's free built-in VPN, letting users in five countries swap regions on the fly. Here's how it works and what else is new in Firefox 151.

item.title: Xbox hires game industry analyst Matthew Ball to lead strategy
item.description: Microsoft has recruited game industry analyst Matthew Ball as Xbox chief strategy officer. Ball publishes an annual state of video gaming report, which is a popular read across the game industry, and he's "widely respected across gaming, media, and technology," according to Xbox CEO Asha Sharma. Sharma announced Ball is joining Microsoft in a memo […]...

item.title: J’ai testé le TV LG 65C6, un téléviseur OLED moins lumineux que la version 77 pouces
item.description: Le successeur du très apprécié C5 progresse en luminosité tout en conservant l'excellence qui caractérise la série C depuis plusieurs années. Mais, cette taille embarque une dalle différente de la version 77 pouces que j'avais testée. Je vous explique tout dans ce test complet.

item.title: Google Search’s AI evolution includes more ads
item.description: Google's AI-powered Search era apparently also extends to its ads. Now, when you search for a product, Google's Gemini AI chatbot will surface relevant items and generate a "custom explainer" about why you should purchase a specific one. The update comes just one day after Google revealed a new Search box for larger, more conversational […]

item.title: I've been working on Microsoft's 13-inch Surface Pro 12th Gen for Business running Intel Core Ultra Series 3, and am surprised by its speed and battery life, but oh that fan
item.description: Surface Pro comes roaring back with a powerful Intel mobile CPU in an unchanged design.

item.title: Android Auto's big 2026 makeover is Gemini at its most practical
item.description: Android Auto's big 2026 makeover is full of small but helpful upgrades.

item.title: Boîte de réception | Mythes et légendes informatiques (pas toutes fausses)
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on s’attaque à quelques concepts du monde informatique si tenaces qu’ils doivent bien avoir un fond de vérité…

item.title: Forfait eSIM : quels sont les opérateurs compatibles et offres disponibles ?
item.description: Si on peut déjà statuer sur la fin programmée de la vénérable carte SIM et de la Nano SIM, la démocratisation de l'eSIM reste encore trop timide en France malgré sa disponibilité chez la majorité des opérateurs. Voici où la trouver

item.title: Mémoire saturée sur votre smartphone ? Cet astucieux lecteur de cartes SD Ugreen perd 25 % chez Amazon
item.description: Compact et compatible avec les supports magnétiques pour une meilleure prise en main, ce lecteur de cartes SD 4.0 est un excellent accessoire à lier à votre smartphone pour moins de 25 euros grâce à cette offre d'Amazon.

item.title: The Kingdom Come studio is officially making a Lord of the Rings RPG
item.description: We don't know much yet, but the Kingdom Come studio is making a Lord of the Rings RPG

item.title: Mini Shai-Halud hackers publish over 600 compromised npm packages — developers warned to be on their guard
item.description: The Shai-Hulud campaign continues, now affecting hundreds of new packages and potentially compromising thousands of projects.

item.title: Wi-Fi Mesh, répéteur ou kit CPL : comment améliorer sa connexion Internet ?
item.description: Votre box internet ne distribue pas correctement le réseau Wi-Fi dans toutes les pièces de votre maison ? Fort heureusement, le Wi-Fi maillé (mesh) et les répéteurs sont là pour vous aider à améliorer tout ça. Que choisir ? On fait le point.

item.title: Anker just launched the Solix S2000 and pre-orders get a major $1,400 discount
item.description: Pre-orders for the new Anker Solix S2000 for $599 at Anker, down from the list price of $1,999.99. That's a major 70% discount.

item.title: Anker’s travel-friendly Laptop Power Bank has returned to its best price of the year
item.description: Whether you’re heading out for a quick Memorial Day getaway or preparing for summer travel, a reliable power bank can come in handy when there’s no outlet in sight. Fortunately, Anker’s Laptop Power Bank can keep all your essential gadgets charged, and it’s currently on sale at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart for $95.99 ($24 off), which is […]

item.title: NiPoGi Hyper H2 : j’ai testé un mini-PC Intel Raptor Lake à (presque) petit prix
item.description: Esthétique originale et petit prix – malgré les dramatiques hausses sur certains composants – sont les principaux atouts de l’Hyper H2. La nouvelle machine imaginée par NiPoGi est facturée un peu moins de 500 euros : le bon investissement pour un petit PC domestique ?

item.title: This Nintendo Switch 2 controller might just be the worst I've used — with input lag issues, long-winded pairing, and random disconnections seriously holding it back
item.description: Despite featuring Hall effect thumbsticks, Snakebyte's RGB-equipped Switch 2 controller is plagued with wireless connectivity issues.

item.title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
item.description: Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses, but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said they verified that their leaked data is authentic.

item.title: Gemini Intelligence hardware requirements revealed — here's which Samsung, Google, and other Android phones can run Create My Widget, Rambler, and more
item.description: Small print on the Gemini Intelligence site reveals that most pre-2026 phones won't get access to the software, including the Galaxy Z Fold 7, Pixel 9 series, and more.

item.title: How to watch Freiburg vs. Aston Villa online for free
item.description: How to watch Europa League for free. Live stream Freiburg vs. Aston Villa in the Europa League final for free.

item.title: Snag Sonys XM6 noise-cancelling headphones while theyre back at their best price ever
item.description: The Sony WH-1000XM6 noise-cancelling headphones are on sale at Amazon for just $398 ahead of Memorial Day weekend. That's $61.99 off.

item.title: Project Aura: Everything to know about Xreals Android XR glasses
item.description: Xreal debuted a new pair of XR glasses at Google I/O, and they sound pretty nifty.

item.title: Le paiement par Wero arrive cet été : BNP Paribas et Hello Bank se préparent
item.description: Le système de paiement européen Wero continue son développement. La banque BNP Paribas prévient ses clients des prochaines étapes du déploiement.

item.title: SpaceX lance cette nuit la version la plus ambitieuse du Starship, avec des tests jamais tentés
item.description: Le douzième vol d'essai du Starship, prévu dans la nuit de mercredi à jeudi, marquera le premier lancement de l'année 2026 et surtout le baptême du feu de la version V3 du système Starship/Super Heavy. Au programme : un booster profondément remanié, un moteur Raptor plus puissant et plus léger,...

item.title: The 14 best portable power station deals in Amazon's Memorial Day sale — these are the most reliable off-grid units based on our performance tests
item.description: Big savings on some of our top-rated Jackery, Bluetti, Anker, and EcoFlow portable power stations.

item.title: 'The entire season meant nothing': The Boys viewers react with dismay and disbelief to the popular Prime Video show's 'absolutely trash' series finale
item.description: The Boys' last-ever episode has drawn overwhelmingly negative reactions from its online community.

item.title: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI
item.description: In a memo to employees, CEO Sasan Goodarzi said the layoffs are meant to reduce complexity, simplify the company's corporate structure, and deliver better AI products.

item.title: J’ai essayé la Cupra Born électrique restylée : encore plus d’autonomie et des écrans Android qui lui font du bien
item.description: Juste avant l'arrivée tant attendue de la citadine Raval, la marque Cupra a décidé d'offrir une nouvelle jeunesse à sa première voiture électrique : la Born. Restylage, nouvelles technologies embarquées et nouvelle batterie : j'ai pu prendre le volant de cette version améliorée.

item.title: Sony The Collexion review: Bad name, fantastic headphones
item.description: Sony’s $650 The Collexion headphones celebrate the 1000X line anniversary. Here’s how they compare to the WH-1000XM6.

item.title: GTA 6 : pour le patron de Take Two, l’IA ne peut pas créer des jeux à succès
item.description: Le président de Take-Two, éditeur de Rockstar Games, livre une vision de l'IA tranchée mais mesurée sur l'IA dans le contexte de la créativité. Malgré son utilité, un tel outil n'est visiblement pas la panacée pour un jeu comme GTA 6, mais un simple moyen de gagner du temps.

item.title: AI search startups are blowing up
item.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

item.title: Cuneflow's e-paper writing tablet uses AI to record and transcribe meetings
item.description: The e-paper slate has a built-in voice recorder to save you having to take meeting minutes.

item.title: Utahs ban on VPNs for porn is on hold, but not for long
item.description: Utah intends to ban VPNs to view adult content, but there's now a hold for certain websites.

item.title: It’s Officially Election Season in Trumpworld
item.description: With Trump nemesis Thomas Massie vanquished, Republican strategists are now eyeing races in Texas, California, and Maine.

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
item.description: High school graduation is a time of change that might be felt more deeply by family members than by the grads themselves. While some grads may immediately embark on a career path, many continue their education and delve deeper into their studies at college. Either way, they'll be taking on more responsibility, meaning it's up […]

item.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create six-minute songs
item.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks

item.title: How to watch Freiburg vs Aston Villa: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for Europa League Final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Freiburg vs Aston Villa live streams online and from anywhere for free, as German and English sides do battle in the Europa League Final.

item.title: Power-Book III: Raising Kanan season 5 — release date, trailer, cast, and what to expect from final-ever season of hit Starz show
item.description: Power-Book III: Raising Kanan season 5 might be one of the longest TV titles around, but new episodes will be its final hurrah. Here's what we know about the Starz show so far.

item.title: Save $100 on the Dreame L50 Ultra and enjoy cleaner floors
item.description: As of May 20, save $100 off the Dreame L50 Ultra robot vacuum and mop at Amazon.

item.title: The best Memorial Day power station deals: Save on Jackery, Anker, DJI, and more
item.description: Memorial Day sales on portable power stations take over 50% off models from Anker Solix, Jackery, DJI, and more.

item.title: Kelsey Impicciche needs a PC built to handle The Sims, plus more creator essentials
item.description: Kelsey Impicciche has over one million YouTube subscribers watching her play "The Sims," so she needs reliable equipment for seamless streaming and gaming.

item.title: The best Memorial Day mattress deals to shop this week: Saatva, Nectar, and more
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day mattress deals from brands like Saatva, DreamCloud, and Avocado. Save hundreds on a new bed today.

item.title: Amazons Memorial Day sale is live — save on TVs, Bose earbuds, Jackery power stations, and more
item.description: Amazon Memorial Day deals take over 50% off TVs, Bose earbuds, Jackery portable power stations, and more

item.title: Android users have just gained access to a new VPN app as Obscura VPN lands on Google Play and Obtainum
item.description: Obscura VPN has officially arrived on Android, bringing its innovative two-party relay architecture to mobile users. The app is available now on Google Play and Obtainium with a 25% launch discount.

item.title: What’s keeping IT leaders up at night in the AI era?
item.description: With the constant threat of a debilitating cyber breach hanging over their heads, it is no surprise that 69% of IT leaders cite data security as the top concern.

item.title: Don't sweat it during the bank holiday heatwave — I'm a home tech editor, and these are the top 3 cheap fans I recommend to help you chill out
item.description: The temperature is set to rocket this weekend, so grab one of these affordable fans now so you can stay comfortable at home and on the move.

item.title: 40+ of the best Memorial Day deals — TVs, mattresses, headphones, and more on sale
item.description: Memorial Day is on May 25, but sales have already started, so we rounded up the best deals on mattresses, tech, TVs, and more.
